typography.heading_strategy: Massive, structural, tight tracking. Avoid centering. Use Unbounded for high impact.
typography.body_strategy: Clean, highly readable geometric sans (Manrope). Use JetBrains Mono for technical details, overlines, and labels.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-[8vw] leading-[0.9] tracking-tighter uppercase
scale.label: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento-style and asymmetric grids. High tension. Empty space is intentional. Use 12-column grid for precise placement.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (very sharp, brutalist edge)

motion_and_interactions.gsap: Use ScrollTrigger for text reveals, parallax images, and pinned sections.
motion_and_interactions.threejs: Use React Three Fiber + Drei for an abstract, dark, wireframe or particle background in the hero section.
motion_and_interactions.cursor: Custom GSAP-based cursor. A small dot that expands and changes color when hovering over links, buttons, or images.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Images scale up slightly (1.05) inside overflow-hidden containers. Text links use an animated underline or color shift.

components.navigation: Fixed header, glassmorphic (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) or transparent depending on scroll position. Border bottom #262626.
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Background accent primary (#D3FF24), text black. Hover: invert to black bg, accent border and text. High contrast.
components.cards: Flat surfaces (#121212), 1px border (#262626). No soft shadows. Use sharp, technical aesthetics.
components.forms: Minimalist inputs. border-b only, no full borders. Focus state highlights bottom border with Accent Primary.

hero_backgrounds.description: amber and dark curves on black (Fallback if Three.js is not loaded)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add gsap @studio-freight/lenis @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei three lucide-react`.
Implement Lenis for global smooth scrolling in the main layout.
Create a custom cursor component that tracks mouse position and uses GSAP for smooth follow.
Hero Section: Full screen (100vh). Must contain a React Three Fiber canvas rendering a slow-moving, dark abstract mesh or particles. Layer the massive 'STUDIO NOVA' title over it.
Typography: Use `Unbounded` for headers and `Manrope` for body text. Add these via Google Fonts in index.html.
About Section: Implement a pinned scroll effect where large manifesto text changes opacity as the user scrolls (GSAP ScrollTrigger).
Portfolio Grid: Use CSS Grid with varying column spans (bento style). Implement image scaling on hover.
Marquee: Use CSS keyframes or GSAP for an infinite scrolling client logo/text marquee.
Forms: Keep it barebones—just bottom borders on inputs. No heavy Shadcn forms needed.
